title: Center Items Horizontally
description: Create a flex container with 3 items centered horizontally.
instructions:
1. Create a container with display: flex
2. Add 3 items
3. Use justify-content: center
solution: .container { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 1rem; background: #f0f0f0; padding: 1rem; }
validation: Items should be centered in the container.

title: Navigation with Logo Left, Links Right
description: Create a navigation bar with the logo on the left and navigation links on the right.
instructions:
1. Create a nav container with display: flex
2. Add a logo div and a links div
3. Use justify-content: space-between
4. Style appropriately
solution: nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background: #333; color: white; padding: 1rem 2rem; } nav .links { display: flex; gap: 1rem; } nav a { color: white; text-decoration: none; }
hints: Use space-between to push logo left and links right
Nest a flex container for the links
validation: Logo on left, links on right.

title: Centered Pagination with Space Distribution
description: Create a pagination component with page numbers centered, using space-evenly for equal spacing.
instructions:
1. Create a pagination container
2. Add page number items (1-5)
3. Use justify-content: center on the container
4. Use space-evenly on the page numbers
5. Style current page differently
solution: .pagination { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 0.25rem; } .page-item { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; } .page-item.active { background: #42a5f5; color: white; border-color: #42a5f5; }
hints: Use nested flex containers for the overall centering and item spacing
validation: Pagination should be centered with equal spacing between numbers.
